title: Can't get item id with make
excerpt:
Hi there, 
Trying to find an items id with make by phone number value, 
But it doesn’t return item id for some reason… 
What am I missing? 
(Item exists on this board)

posts.author: David (David)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @David and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Would you be able to please try this again but passing the phone number without “-” symbols?

Please let me know if that does the trick!

Cheers,
Matias
